title: Key separation enforcement: identity vs wallet
description: Audit and document that Ed25519 identity seed (identity.key) and ZIP-32 wallet seed (wallet.key) are derived from independent entropy sources. Add a runtime assertion that the first 32 bytes of each file differ (and add to init code). Add a CLAUDE.md section: wallet seed must never be derived from the identity key or vice versa.
close_reason: Runtime assertion in wallet_init: wallet spending_key != identity seed bytes (--no-passphrase path only, avoids double prompt)
